creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
There's an even newer version 17.12.5: https://github.com/thought-machine/please/releases/tag/v17.12.5

I've been using please a lot recently and am interested in seeing this port updated. I'm willing to take a stab at it.

That said, Muhammad mentioned the bootstrapping issue. I've written a small script to bootstrap it. The only dependency should be go 1.23 in PATH so that please doesn't try to download its own version.

https://github.com/patmaddox/lab/blob/trunk/src/please/bootstrap.sh
